ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the movie */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the movie (e.g., PG-13) */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the movie */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "released" TEXT /* Date and location of the movie's release */,
  "score" REAL /* User rating score */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of user votes */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director of the movie */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the writer of the movie */,
  "star_id" INTEGER /* ID of the star of the movie */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the movie was produced */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the movie in USD */,
  "gross" INTEGER /* Gross earnings of the movie in USD */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production company of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "released_year" TEXT /* Year the movie was released (for sorting and filtering) */,
  "sequel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequel movie */,
  "prequel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prequel movie */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie trailer */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie poster */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Brief description of the movie plot */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Any awards the movie has won */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Date when production started */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* Date when production ended */,
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distributor */,
  "production_status" TEXT /* Current status of the movie (e.g., in production, post-production, released) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_distributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("distributor_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_rating FOREIGN KEY ("rating") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_prequel_id FOREIGN KEY ("prequel_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_writer_id FOREIGN KEY ("writer_id") REFERENCES writers ("writer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_star_id FOREIGN KEY ("star_id") REFERENCES stars ("star_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_sequel_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequel_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Action, Drama) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for sub-genres) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the director is from */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "deathdate" TEXT /* Date of death of the director (if applicable) */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Any awards the director has won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "writer_name" TEXT /* Name of the writer */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the writer */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the writer is from */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Date of birth of the writer */,
  "deathdate" TEXT /* Date of death of the writer (if applicable) */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Any awards the writer has won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stars" (
  "star_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each star */,
  "star_name" TEXT /* Name of the star */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the star */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the star is from */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Date of birth of the star */,
  "deathdate" TEXT /* Date of death of the star (if applicable) */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Any awards the star has won */,
  "social_media_url" TEXT /* URL to the star's social media profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("star_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the rating (e.g., PG-13) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being released */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the movie is released */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of the release */,
  "release_location" TEXT /* Location of the release */,
  "box_office_earnings" INTEGER /* Gross earnings in the specific country */,
  "marketing_budget" INTEGER /* Marketing budget for the release in the specific country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the movie */,
  "rating_score" REAL /* Score given by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text review provided by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., producer, marketer, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
